field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII excluding CR, LF (may include spaces)

field.name: TimeVal
field.value: DIGIT{14} [ '.' DIGIT{1-} ] - format YYYYMMDDHHMMSS[.fraction]; ASCII digits and optional '.'

field.name: FactList
field.value: FEAT/OPTS: 1*( factname ['*'] ';' ) ; MLST data-line: 0*( factname '=' factvalue ';' ) ; factname chars = ALPHA / DIGIT / '.' / '_' / '-' ; '*' only valid in FEAT/OPTS context ; factvalue = printable ASCII/UTF-8 excluding ';' CR LF

field.name: SeparatorToPathname
field.value: 1B or 2B containing 0x20; normally 1 SP between trailing ';' and pathname; exactly 2 SP are used when no facts are returned

field.name: Pathname
field.value: UTF-8 or server encoding; printable chars excluding CR LF

field.name: Username
field.value: US-ASCII octets excluding CR (0x0D) and LF (0x0A)

field.name: Argument
field.value: ASCII letters or digits; e.g. 'ALL' or network-protocol-number (digits)

field.name: ResponseText
field.value: ASCII text indicating server is entering extended passive mode (may be localized)

field.name: Delimiter
field.value: ASCII printable excluding CR, LF, and '(' or ')' ; commonly '|' or other printable character

field.name: TCPPort
field.value: decimal digits representing port number, range 1-65535

field.name: Pathname
field.value: US-ASCII octets 0x20-0x7E (printable) and extended octets; excluding 0x0D (CR) and 0x0A (LF)

field.name: CommandName
field.value: ASCII letters/digits/hyphen; case-insensitive; no SP, CR, LF

field.name: CommandOptions
field.value: command-dependent; generally ASCII excluding CR/LF; for MLST: 1*(factname ';') where factname is printable token excluding SP and ';'

field.name: Base64Data
field.value: Base64 alphabet: A-Z a-z 0-9 + / with '=' padding; ASCII characters only; no CR or LF

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII printable characters excluding CR and LF (may include SP)

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII octets excluding CR and LF; may include SP

field.name: NetAddr
field.value: ASCII, protocol-dependent (e.g., AF1: digits and '.' dotted-decimal; AF2: IPv6 textual with hex, ':' and '.')

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII or UTF-8 excluding CR and LF

field.name: FactList
field.value: ASCII printable excluding CR and LF; semicolon-separated list of facts of the form Key=Value; Examples of keys and value syntaxes: Type={file,dir,cdir,pdir,link}, Size=decimal (bytes), Modify=YYYYMMDDhhmmss (UTC timestamp), Perm=string of permission letters (server-defined), Unique=opaque-string; each fact pair is terminated by ';'

field.name: FileName
field.value: UTF-8 or server encoding; printable characters excluding CR and LF

field.name: Base64Data
field.value: Base64 alphabet: [A-Z][a-z][0-9]+/ and '=' padding; ASCII (Telnet string) excluding CR and LF

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII excluding CR, LF (may include SP)

field.name: Password
field.value: ASCII printable characters excluding CR (0x0D) and LF (0x0A); may be empty

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII characters excluding CR and LF

field.name: Pathname
field.value: Printable ASCII (0x20-0x7E) excluding CR (0x0D) and LF (0x0A)

field.name: ArgumentString
field.value: NVT-ASCII printable characters excluding CR and LF

field.name: Pathname
field.value: NVT-ASCII octets excluding CR and LF (may include spaces)

field.name: Argument
field.value: Telnet-language printable characters excluding CR (0x0D) and LF (0x0A)

field.name: MechanismName
field.value: Printable US-ASCII excluding SP, CR, LF; typically ALPHA / DIGIT / '-' ; case-insensitive; may begin with 'X-' for local use; registered values with IANA

field.name: Base64Payload
field.value: [A-Z][a-z][0-9]+/ and '=' padding; no CR or LF; case-sensitive; canonical base64 length is a multiple of 4 chars (padding '=' used per RFC2228); arbitrarily long

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII excluding CR, LF (may include SP)

field.name: Base64Data
field.value: Base64 (ASCII): A-Z a-z 0-9 + / = ; no CR or LF; Telnet string as per RFC 2228 Section 9

field.name: Pathname
field.value: ASCII printable or octets excluding CR and LF; may include spaces; must not contain CR(0x0D) or LF(0x0A)
